mapper.select: SELECT p.id, p.title, p.content, p.user_id, p.view_count, p.like_count, p.comment_count, p.create_time, u.nickname AS authorNickname, u.avatar AS authorAvatar, c.name AS categoryName FROM user_favorite f JOIN post p ON f.post_id = p.id LEFT JOIN user u ON p.user_id = u.id LEFT JOIN category c ON p.category_id = c.id WHERE f.user_id = #{userId} AND p.status = 1 ORDER BY f.create_time DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{limit}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM user_favorite f JOIN post p ON f.post_id = p.id WHERE f.user_id = #{userId} AND p.status = 1
